ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Continued To Jan-31-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernest Der for Angel Mariveles (Petitioner).

Mr. Der stated that he prepared a supplemental declaration, that he e-mailed it to his Client last week, that he has not received a signature and that they are still missing receipts. The Frist and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is continued to January 31, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Continued To Dec-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Continued To Nov-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Meckfessel for Angel Mariveles (Executor).

The Court questions why an inventory and appraisal and a petition for final distribution have not been filed. Mr. Meckfessel stated that they have had considerable communication issues with their Client, that he feels they have crossed that hurdle, that he is meeting with the Client next week and that he needs 60-days. Status on filing of said documents is continued to November 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, LIMITED APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Terminate Special Administration; For Approval Of Fees And Costs To Attorney; And For Release Of Funds To Trust Under Section 13100 Affidavit
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (petitioner) Angel Mariveles.

The Court asked if counsel has anything else to consider. Mr. Der reported that his client has been in the Phillipines, that he was hoping to be able to locate family members while he was there but counsel does not think he has, that the daughter of the trust beneficiary has not responded to the letters or copies of petition sent to her and confirmed that they will be filing another petition. The Court stated that the underlying petition to terminate special administration is denied.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To Mar-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Terminate Special Administration; For Approval Of Fees And Costs To Attorney; And For Release Of Funds To Trust Under Section 13100 Affidavit
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Continued To Jan-04-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Continued To Jan-04-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Terminate Special Administration; For Approval Of Fees And Costs To Attorney; And For Release Of Funds To Trust Under Section 13100 Affidavit
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Continued To Dec-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (petitioner) Angel Mariveles.

The Court stated that it has concerns regarding the proposal. Mr. Der stated that it is an unusual request, that the equities weigh in favor, that there is only $80,000.00 left in the blocked account, that the main challenge is locating the heirs to give notice, that no one is responding and that they are unable to obtain addresses, that Luz Loreto died, they found her obituary and obtained names of her children, that they were able to find an address for one of the children but have received no response, that they would need to waive notice to 90% of the beneficiaries, that they would need to hold on to 50% of the estate to try to find the heirs, that the main heir is 80 years old and would like to move back to the Philippines, that he spoke with Sally Gratz of the San Francisco Public Guardian's office and was told that they would have the same issues and proceed the same way that Mr. Der is and that they would like to wrap this up and get the funds into the trust. The Court stated that it will need to look at this further. The petition to terminate special administration, etc., and the status of estate were continued to December 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Mar-11-2015 Continued To Jun-01-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for (petitioner) Angel Mariveles.

Mr. Der reported that he is working on finding the heirs in the Philipines, that emails are being sent but they are not getting responses and requested a continuance. Mr. Der requested that the letters of special administration be extended and provided an order which was signed and returned to him in open court. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to June 1, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
